overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character carrying a large cargo container walking through a desolate mountain valley. The environment transitions from dark volcanic terrain to grassy paths as the character approaches a distant opening in the valley with structures visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain valley with dark volcanic soil

agents.ego_description: character carrying a large cargo container on their back walking steadily through the narrow rocky valley

entered.detail: steep rocky mountain wall forming the left side of the valley
steep rocky mountain wall forming the right side of the valley
large dark rocks scattered across the valley floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow mountain valley with steep rocky cliffs on both sides. The ground is covered in dark volcanic soil and scattered boulders. The sky is overcast, creating a desolate and isolated atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley with mixed rocky and grassy terrain

events.description: ground surface transitions from dark volcanic soil to patches of green grass and vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing through the valley as the terrain becomes greener with taller grass patches appearing on the sides

entered.detail: jagged rock formation protruding from the left mountainside
clumps of green grass and small bushes growing on the valley floor

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the valley floor transitions from dark rock to patches of green grass and vegetation. Rocky outcrops become visible on the mountainsides while the path remains narrow and enclosed by the steep cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: valley exit approaching open landscape with distant structures

events.description: valley opens up revealing distant structures and ruins on the horizon

agents.ego_description: approaching the valley exit with distant structures visible ahead, walking through taller grass

entered.detail: ruined buildings or industrial structures visible through the valley opening on the horizon
blue tent or equipment cache visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The valley opens up as the character approaches the exit, revealing distant structures and ruins on the horizon. The ground is now covered in dense grass, and a blue equipment tent appears on the right side. The mountains transition to more sloped terrain as the path leads toward the open landscape ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow mountain valley that transforms from a desolate volcanic corridor into an open, grassy landscape. It begins with the character traversing dark volcanic soil and scattered boulders beneath an overcast sky, flanked by steep, imposing rocky cliffs. As the character progresses, the dark terrain gradually gives way to patches of green vegetation and rocky outcrops along the mountainsides. The scene then expands as the valley opens toward the horizon, shifting the ground to dense grass and revealing a blue equipment tent on the right. Finally, the steep cliffs transition into sloped terrain as the path leads toward distant structures and ruins in the open landscape ahead.
